records.ety: [L. alacritas, fr. alacer lively, eager, prob. akin to Gr. <?/ to drive, Goth. aljan zeal.]

defs: A cheerful readiness, willingness, or promptitude; joyous activity; briskness; sprightliness; as, the soldiers advanced with alacrity to meet the enemy.
quotes: I have not that alacrity of spirit, Nor cheer of mind that I was wont to have.
